Headline: Merger - Marling School (State), Gloucestershire
Info: Parents and pupils have launched a petition opposing the proposed renaming of the historic Marling School to 'Lift Marling', a change proposed as part of its planned merger into the national academy trust, Lift Schools.

Headline: Closure - Thetford Grammar School, Norfolk
Info: Reports indicate that the historic Thetford Grammar School has announced its closure amid a wider trend of independent schools shutting down due to the financial impact of the new VAT levy on school fees.

Headline: Closure - St Lawrence College, Kent
Info: The Charity Commission has opened a regulatory compliance case into St Lawrence College after the independent school entered administration and closed to most year groups, citing severe financial pressures and the imposition of VAT on fees [3.2].
